rows.notes: Clear centered title at top of page, fully legible handwriting and no amounts in this line.
Clear centered subtitle immediately under the title; no monetary columns present on this line.
Left-margin section label for the group of entries below. The date and section heading are legible though written in the margin.
Monetary columns well aligned with ruling lines; pounds=20, shillings=6, pence=8 clearly written and within valid ranges.
Amount reads as 27.0.0 with clear alignment. The place/name is slightly abbreviated but the numeric columns are unambiguous.
Pounds, shillings and pence are aligned and legible; the name 'Shiers' is slightly stylized but readable. All currency values within valid ranges.
Large pounds value '600.0.0' very clear and well aligned with ruling lines. Description text readable enough to identify as augmentation for two chaplains.

rows.description: Rectori, e legato Jnis Bray, pro rata anni past.
rows.notes: Numeric columns for 5.9.2 are clear and within valid ranges. Some letters in the description (Jnis/legato) are faded/abbreviated; chosen reading based on common phrasing and surrounding letters.
Amount '25.0.0' clearly written and aligned. Description legible though Latin abbreviated; reading chosen from visible letter shapes.
Left-margin section header introducing next group; handwriting clear and date visible.
Amount '34.13.4' is well aligned and legible. Parenthetical reference p231 visible. No fraction after pence.

rows.description: Kidlington pro Augment: Comm: pro 3 quarteris
rows.notes: Clear reading of '45.7.6'. The place-name 'Kidlington' and note about 3 quarters is legible; currency columns align with ruling lines.

Pounds and shillings clearly '112.12'. Pence reads as '4' with a small loop/mark after it interpreted as 'ob' (halfpenny = 0.5). The fractional mark is faint; alternate readings possible, hence moderate confidence.

rows.description: L. Witt Deb pro semestri ad triennis (p234)
rows.notes: Pounds and shillings read as '103.1'. Pence shows '1' with a tiny superscript/loop that looks like a farthing mark ('q' = 0.25). The fraction is faint and ambiguous; chosen 0.25 based on the small tail resembling a farthing sign.
Amount '102.3.8' clearly aligned and legible; parenthetical references 235/236 visible. Description readable.

rows.description: Rectori ad Annunc. ut supra ad Nativ:
rows.notes: Numeric '30.9.2' clear. Description is abbreviated Latin but matches phrasing used elsewhere on page; alignment with column lines confirms amounts.
Left-margin label for the next festival (St. John Baptist). Abbreviations (D: J: Bapt:) are slightly compressed but interpretable in context.
Amount '20.6.8' clear and aligned. Parenthetical page reference p240 visible. Description abbreviations consistent with earlier entries.

rows.description: Kidlington Augm: Comm. pro 4ta anni parte (243)
rows.notes: Columns read as 15.2.6 clearly. The descriptor indicates Kidlington augmentation for the fourth part of the year; handwriting of descriptor is legible enough for this reading.

rows.description: Stip. Dns Shier ad dictum fest (p241)
rows.notes: Amount '33.6.8' aligned and clear. The name 'Shier' is abbreviated and followed by a parenthetical ref p241; reading chosen based on letter shapes and parallels elsewhere on the page.
Clear numeric '50.0.0' aligned to pounds column. Description (augmentation for governor/moderator and subdeacon) is legible though Latin abbreviations present.

rows.description: Rectori ad fest D:J:B ut supra ad Annun.
rows.notes: Amount '30.9.2' consistent with similarly worded lines above; description uses same abbreviations as earlier and is interpreted by analogy.
Left-margin label for the Michaelmas festival group. Abbreviation 'Michl' (Michael) is standard and legible.
Amount '27.0.0' clearly written. Place name reads as 'Gwinear' (common parish name) – letters are legible enough for that reading but slightly stylized.
Amount reads '34.15.6' with clear alignment. Descriptor 'Long Witt' visible and consistent with other place/names on the page.

rows.description: Rectori ad Micl ut supra ad D:J:Bapt.
rows.notes: Amount '30.9.2' legible. Description mirrors earlier 'Rectori' lines and is read by analogy; some abbreviations present but consistent.
Final page total printed at lower right reads as '926.19.4' (the leading '9' is slightly heavier but visible). Alignment with the right-hand columns confirms pounds/shillings/pence positions.
